description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script executing `docker info` for every job and defines three stages: build_image, reduce_image_size, and upload. In the build_image stage add four jobs: build_odoo8_branch_on_trusty runs `docker build -t ubuntu1404-odoo8 -f ubuntu-14-04/8.0/Dockerfile .`; build_odoo9_branch_on_trusty runs `docker build -t ubuntu1404-odoo9 -f ubuntu-14-04/9.0/Dockerfile .`; build_odoo_saas10_branch_on_trusty runs `docker build -t ubuntu1404-saas10 -f ubuntu-14-04/saas-10/Dockerfile .`; and build_odoo_saas9_branch_on_trusty runs `docker build -t ubuntu1404-saas9 -f ubuntu-14-04/saas-9/Dockerfile .`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined, and the pipeline does not deploy any images.
